description: Sellsuki MCP Contract Registry — index of all approved machine-readable contracts. MCP servers read from this file to resolve contract_id → latest approved version.

contracts.summary: Canonical AppShell 2.0 — topnav-led shell with left product sidebar
Brand hierarchy — Sellsuki in topnav, product identity secondary in sidebar
AI/vibe coding rules — DS 2.0 compliance for generation, scaffold, and prompts

versioning_policy.major: Shell/hierarchy/brand ownership changes — teams may need to migrate
versioning_policy.minor: New defaults, new fields, new guidance added — backwards compatible
versioning_policy.patch: Clarification, typo fix, metadata only — no behavior change

governance.change_process: Update policy docs → update contract JSON → bump version → update registry → update changelog
